mapper.sql: id, task_id, route_id, section_id, unit_id, route_code, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, disease_category, disease_type, disease_name, severity, quantity, measure_unit, damage_area, damage_length, damage_width, damage_depth, source, confidence, status, verified, verified_by, verified_at, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, remark, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM disease_record WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM disease_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = false
SELECT FROM disease_record WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT count(1) AS total_count, count(CASE WHEN severity = 'HEAVY' THEN 1 END) AS heavy_count, count(CASE WHEN severity = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) AS medium_count, count(CASE WHEN severity = 'LIGHT' THEN 1 END) AS light_count, coalesce(sum(damage_area), 0) AS total_area, coalesce(sum(damage_length), 0) AS total_length FROM disease_record WHERE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO disease_record(id, tenant_id, task_id, route_id, section_id, unit_id, route_code, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, disease_category, disease_type, disease_name, severity, quantity, measure_unit, damage_area, damage_length, damage_width, damage_depth, source, confidence, geom, status, verified, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{taskId}, #{routeId}, #{sectionId}, #{unitId}, #{routeCode}, #{direction}, #{laneNo}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{diseaseCategory}, #{diseaseType}, #{diseaseName}, #{severity}, #{quantity}, #{measureUnit}, #{damageArea}, #{damageLength}, #{damageWidth}, #{damageDepth}, #{source}, #{confidence}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{status}, #{verified}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE disease_record SET task_id=#{taskId}, route_id=#{routeId}, section_id=#{sectionId}, unit_id=#{unitId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, direction=#{direction}, lane_no=#{laneNo}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, disease_category=#{diseaseCategory}, disease_type=#{diseaseType}, disease_name=#{diseaseName}, severity=#{severity}, quantity=#{quantity}, measure_unit=#{measureUnit}, damage_area=#{damageArea}, damage_length=#{damageLength}, damage_width=#{damageWidth}, damage_depth=#{damageDepth}, source=#{source}, confidence=#{confidence}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
